name: GLM-4
archDisplay: Dense Transformer (undisclosed size; architecture details not published)
note: Original closed flagship unveiled at Zhipu DevDay, 128K context + 'All Tools' agent, positioned near GPT-4; since retired from the API in favor of GLM-4-Long/Flash and the open GLM-4.x/GLM-5 lines.

results.notes: GLM-4 (0520) checkpoint, Table 2 of the ChatGLM/GLM-4 technical report (columns: MMLU GSM8K MATH BBH GPQA HumanEval -> 83.3 93.3 61.3 84.7 39.9 78.5); GPT-4-0314 scores 35.7 on the same table.

IFEval English Loose-Prompt (L-P) accuracy for GLM-4 (0520), Table 3. Same table also reports English Loose-Instruction 88.7, English Strict-Prompt 79.1, Chinese Loose-Prompt 79.7 for the identical checkpoint.

Berkeley Function Call Leaderboard, Overall score for the GLM-4 (0520) checkpoint, Table 7 of the GLM family technical report (~2k question-function-answer pairs). Same table: GPT-4 Turbo (2024-04-09)=81.24, GPT-4o (2024-05-13)=82.94. No explicit v1/v2/v3 tag in the paper, but the June 2024 publication timing aligns with the original BFCL (v1) era, so mapped to the 'bfcl' slug rather than 'bfcl-v3'. Genuinely new benchmark not previously tracked for this model.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Zhipu AI's first-ever DevDay (Jan 2024) launch of GLM-4, 128K context + All Tools agent, positioned near GPT-4 (MarkTechPost, Maginative). All 5 result rows re-fetched and confirmed verbatim in Table 2 of arxiv.org/html/2406.12793v1 (GLM-4 0520 checkpoint vs GPT-4-0314). paramsB/archClass correctly left undisclosed/null — no primary source discloses size. No changes made.
